summary: Backend-only testing complete for WPS (Welding Procedure Specification) module. All 24 pytest tests passed. Verified: (1) GET /api/wps/reference-data returns processes, material_groups, positions, joint_types, exec_classes (public endpoint), (2) GET /api/wps/suggest auto-suggests filler material, gas, preheat, interpass temp, NDT% based on welding process, material group, thickness, joint type and execution class, (3) Full CRUD for WPS documents with auto-numbering (WPS-001, WPS-002, etc.), (4) Different material groups return correct preheat rules (8.1 inox and 21.1 aluminum have no preheat, carbon steel follows EN 1011-2), (5) Thick materials (>40mm) correctly recommend preheat >0°C.

reference_data_endpoint.details: Public endpoint returns 7 welding processes (111, 135, 136, 138, 141, 21, 131), 6 material groups (1.1, 1.2, 1.3, 2.1, 8.1, 21.1), 7 positions (PA-PG), 3 joint types (BW, FW, BW+FW), 4 execution classes (EXC1-EXC4)

suggest_carbon_steel_mag.details: Returns filler (G 46 2 M21 3Si1), gas (M21), no preheat for 10mm, interpass max 250°C, NDT 10%

suggest_stainless_steel_tig.details: Returns TIG data, no preheat, interpass max 150°C, NDT 20%

suggest_aluminum_mig.details: Returns aluminum data, no preheat, interpass max 120°C

create_wps.details: Creates WPS with auto-number WPS-001, status=bozza

list_wps.details: Returns {items, total} with user's WPS documents

get_wps.details: Returns single WPS document, 404 for non-existent

update_wps.details: Updates status and fields, persists correctly

auto_numbering.details: WPS numbers increment sequentially per user (WPS-001, WPS-002, etc.)

auth_required.details: All endpoints except reference-data require auth (401 without token)

test_credentials: Created and cleaned up test_wps_user_* and test_wps_session_*
seed_data_creation: Created test WPS documents during tests, all cleaned up via module teardown
context_for_next_testing_agent: WPS module fully functional. Key code locations: (1) routes/wps.py:18-91 contains EN 1090 knowledge base (processes, material groups, filler suggestions, gas suggestions), (2) routes/wps.py:94-119 preheat/interpass calculation functions, (3) routes/wps.py:165-174 reference-data endpoint (public), (4) routes/wps.py:179-254 suggest endpoint with qualified welder matching, (5) routes/wps.py:259-341 CRUD operations with auto-numbering.
